data.title: React 19 RC Features
data.description: React 19 introduces the new compiler and use() hook for better performance and simpler code.

data.title: Node.js 22 Released
data.description: The latest Node.js release brings require() for ES modules and a new WebSocket client.

data.title: Generative AI in 2024
data.description: How generative AI models are shaping the future of software development.

data.title: Google enhances serverless with new cloud runtime
data.description: Google Cloud has introduced an upgraded serverless runtime that improves cold start times and supports more programming languages. This update aims to simplify backend development and allow developers to deploy scalable APIs with minimal configuration.
